description: Soft-tissue injury case. Athlete reports a mild calf strain at the start of week 5 of a marathon block. Per the prompt's INJURY-BASED RESCHEDULING rules, the model MUST: (a) reduce volume 30-50% for 1-2 weeks, (b) replace HARD sessions (Tuesday speed, Saturday quality) with EASY/REST/RECOVERY codes from the library, (c) NOT add any quality codes (RSPS_*, RSS_*, FARTLEK, RCE_*, RP_*) within the 14-day recovery window, (d) NOT diagnose ('tendinitis', 'grade 1/2/3 strain'), (e) NOT prescribe direct medical actions ('ice', 'take ibuprofen', 'rest for N days'), (f) NOT tell the athlete to stop running outright (that's a clinician's call). The rescheduled output must be the constrained JSON-in-delimiters format, and every emitted workoutCode must be from the library.
